output.summary: Removed redundant editorScript and render fields from both CardsGrid block.json files. The editorScript field is unnecessary because webpack already bundles all blocks into editor.js via glob pattern. The render field is unnecessary because inc/helpers/blocks.php automatically sets up render callbacks for all blocks that have a matching .php file.

filesModified.purpose: Removed redundant editorScript and render fields from parent block
Removed redundant render field from child block

verificationDetails.automaticRenderCallback: Confirmed that inc/helpers/blocks.php (lines 17-48) automatically sets up render callbacks for all blocks by looking for a PHP file matching the folder name (e.g., CardsGrid.php, CardsGridItem.php). The render field in block.json is therefore redundant.
verificationDetails.automaticEditorScript: Confirmed that webpack.config.js bundles all block index files via glob pattern: glob.sync('./blocks/**/index.{js,jsx,ts,tsx}'). The editorScript field in block.json is therefore redundant and was causing WordPress to attempt loading raw TypeScript files.

parentBlock.rationale: Both fields are automatically handled by the theme's build system and block registration logic

childBlock.rationale: The render callback is automatically set up by inc/helpers/blocks.php for all blocks with matching PHP files

nextSteps: These changes match the pattern of removing redundant fields across all theme blocks
The blocks will continue to function identically as before since the removed fields were redundant
QA can verify blocks render correctly in both editor and frontend
